emails.subject: Load forecasting data document
emails.body: Load forecasting data document Hi Matt, I apologize for not getting back to you sooner. Here is the document I promised that describes some of the steps I went through to collect and verify data. I will give you a call to discuss.

emails.subject: RE: Load forecasting data document
emails.body: RE: Load forecasting data document Steve, Do you have part 3 and 4 of this document? The last page we have has figure 6, but it looks like there was supposed to be further sections. Mat To: Smith, Matt
